text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle injures herself during training, so I
rush her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Now, don't you fret, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The doctor said I was healthy as a mule! It's back
to training startin' tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And the timing couldn't be better! I'm just happy I
get to snuggle up in bed for a spell!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
My friend lent me this comic, and it's a real
knee-slapper...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whoops! Forget you heard that!
choice_data_list: Make sure you get some good rest.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Okay! I promise to be out like a light!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hehe... So where did I leave off...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: ...What?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Nooo! I forgot the comic back at the dorm!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Can you do me a little favor and go get it
for me? I need it now more than ever!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trainers are prohibited from entering the dorm
rooms, so it's not like I could help anyway... I
make sure she's well rested by day's end.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Aww, shucks! I really wanted to read it...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So what am I supposed to do?! There's nothing in
here!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Gosh... You're awful strict, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the diagnosis suggests there's nothing
seriously wrong with Taiki, she's not in great
spirits.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right, I get it... I know you're just worried
about me.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay! If I can't read any comics, I'll just pass the
time with a good movie!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You're killin' me here, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Taiki Shuttle is back to normal and
ready to resume training.
